title: 员工奖金
description: 查询每个奖金少于 1000 或没有奖金记录的员工姓名和奖金。返回列 name、bonus。
starter_sql:
SELECT
  e.name,
  b.bonus
FROM Employee e
LEFT JOIN Bonus b ON e.empId = b.empId
WHERE b.bonus < 1000 OR b.bonus IS NULL;
expected_sql: SELECT e.name, b.bonus FROM Employee e LEFT JOIN Bonus b ON e.empId = b.empId WHERE b.bonus < 1000 OR b.bonus IS NULL

title: 上升的温度
description: 找出与前一天相比温度更高的记录 id。返回列 id。
starter_sql:
SELECT w1.id
FROM Weather w1
JOIN Weather w2
  ON julianday(w1.recordDate) = julianday(w2.recordDate) + 1
WHERE w1.temperature > w2.temperature;
expected_sql: SELECT w1.id FROM Weather w1 JOIN Weather w2 ON julianday(w1.recordDate) = julianday(w2.recordDate) + 1 WHERE w1.temperature > w2.temperature

title: 部门最高工资
description: 找出每个部门工资最高的员工。返回列 Department、Employee、Salary。
starter_sql:
SELECT
  d.name AS Department,
  e.name AS Employee,
  e.salary AS Salary
FROM Employee e
JOIN Department d ON e.departmentId = d.id
WHERE e.salary = (
  SELECT MAX(e2.salary)
  FROM Employee e2
  WHERE e2.departmentId = e.departmentId
);
expected_sql: SELECT d.name AS Department, e.name AS Employee, e.salary AS Salary FROM Employee e JOIN Department d ON e.departmentId = d.id WHERE e.salary = (SELECT MAX(e2.salary) FROM Employee e2 WHERE e2.departmentId = e.departmentId)

title: 客户下单频率
description: 找出在 2024 年第一季度至少下过 2 单的客户。返回列 customer_id、order_count，并按 customer_id 升序排列。
starter_sql:
SELECT
  customer_id,
  COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM Orders
WHERE order_date >= '2024-01-01'
  AND order_date < '2024-04-01'
GROUP BY customer_id
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
ORDER BY customer_id;
expected_sql: SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM Orders WHERE order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND order_date < '2024-04-01' GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY customer_id

title: 从未下单的客户
description: 找出从未产生订单的客户。返回列 customer_id、name，并按 customer_id 升序排列。
starter_sql:
SELECT
  c.customer_id,
  c.name
FROM Customers c
LEFT JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.order_id IS NULL
ORDER BY c.customer_id;
expected_sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.name FROM Customers c LEFT JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.order_id IS NULL ORDER BY c.customer_id

title: 重复邮箱
description: 找出出现次数超过 1 次的邮箱。返回列 email，并按 email 升序排列。
starter_sql:
SELECT email
FROM Person
GROUP BY email
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY email;
expected_sql: SELECT email FROM Person GROUP BY email HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY email

title: 第二高薪资
description: 查询第二高的不同薪资。返回列 SecondHighestSalary；如果不存在第二高薪资，返回 NULL。
expected_sql: SELECT (SELECT DISTINCT salary FROM Employee ORDER BY salary DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS SecondHighestSalary

title: 每类销售冠军
description: 统计每个商品分类销售额最高的商品，若并列都返回。返回列 category、product_name、revenue，并按 category、product_name 升序排列。
starter_sql:
WITH product_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    p.category,
    p.product_name,
    SUM(s.quantity * s.price) AS revenue
  FROM Products p
  JOIN Sales s ON p.product_id = s.product_id
  GROUP BY p.category, p.product_name
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    category,
    product_name,
    revenue,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS rk
  FROM product_revenue
)
SELECT category, product_name, revenue
FROM ranked
WHERE rk = 1
ORDER BY category, product_name;
expected_sql: WITH product_revenue AS (SELECT p.category, p.product_name, SUM(s.quantity * s.price) AS revenue FROM Products p JOIN Sales s ON p.product_id = s.product_id GROUP BY p.category, p.product_name), ranked AS (SELECT category, product_name, revenue, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS rk FROM product_revenue) SELECT category, product_name, revenue FROM ranked WHERE rk = 1 ORDER BY category, product_name

title: 每位用户金额最高的两笔订单
description: 找出每位用户金额最高的两笔订单。若金额相同，订单号小的排前。返回列 user_id、order_id、amount，并按 user_id、amount 降序、order_id 升序排列。
starter_sql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    order_id,
    amount,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY amount DESC, order_id ASC) AS rn
  FROM Orders
)
SELECT user_id, order_id, amount
FROM ranked
WHERE rn <= 2
ORDER BY user_id, amount DESC, order_id;
expected_sql: WITH ranked AS (SELECT user_id, order_id, amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY amount DESC, order_id ASC) AS rn FROM Orders) SELECT user_id, order_id, amount FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 2 ORDER BY user_id, amount DESC, order_id

title: 账户累计流水
description: 计算每个账户按交易日期和交易号排序后的累计金额。返回列 account_id、txn_date、amount、running_balance，并按 account_id、txn_date、txn_id 排序。
starter_sql:
SELECT
  account_id,
  txn_date,
  amount,
  SUM(amount) OVER (
    PARTITION BY account_id
    ORDER BY txn_date, txn_id
    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
  ) AS running_balance
FROM Transactions
ORDER BY account_id, txn_date, txn_id;
expected_sql: SELECT account_id, txn_date, amount, SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY txn_date, txn_id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_balance FROM Transactions ORDER BY account_id, txn_date, txn_id

title: 连续三天登录
description: 找出至少连续登录 3 天的用户。同一用户同一天多次登录只算一天。返回列 user_id，并按 user_id 升序排列。
starter_sql:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT user_id, login_date
  FROM Logins
), grouped AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    login_date,
    julianday(login_date) - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY login_date) AS grp
  FROM daily
), streaks AS (
  SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS days
  FROM grouped
  GROUP BY user_id, grp
)
SELECT DISTINCT user_id
FROM streaks
WHERE days >= 3
ORDER BY user_id;
expected_sql: WITH daily AS (SELECT DISTINCT user_id, login_date FROM Logins), grouped AS (SELECT user_id, login_date, julianday(login_date) - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY login_date) AS grp FROM daily), streaks AS (SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS days FROM grouped GROUP BY user_id, grp) SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM streaks WHERE days >= 3 ORDER BY user_id

title: 次日留存率
description: 计算首次登录用户的次日留存率。若用户首次登录后的第二天也登录，则算留存。返回列 retention_rate，保留 2 位小数。
starter_sql:
WITH first_login AS (
  SELECT user_id, MIN(login_date) AS first_date
  FROM Logins
  GROUP BY user_id
), retained AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT f.user_id
  FROM first_login f
  JOIN Logins l
    ON f.user_id = l.user_id
   AND julianday(l.login_date) = julianday(f.first_date) + 1
)
SELECT ROUND(1.0 * COUNT(r.user_id) / COUNT(f.user_id), 2) AS retention_rate
FROM first_login f
LEFT JOIN retained r ON f.user_id = r.user_id;
expected_sql: WITH first_login AS (SELECT user_id, MIN(login_date) AS first_date FROM Logins GROUP BY user_id), retained AS (SELECT DISTINCT f.user_id FROM first_login f JOIN Logins l ON f.user_id = l.user_id AND julianday(l.login_date) = julianday(f.first_date) + 1) SELECT ROUND(1.0 * COUNT(r.user_id) / COUNT(f.user_id), 2) AS retention_rate FROM first_login f LEFT JOIN retained r ON f.user_id = r.user_id

title: 月收入环比增长
description: 按月份统计收入，并计算相对上月的增长率。返回列 month、revenue、growth_rate；首月 growth_rate 为 NULL，其他月份保留 2 位小数。
starter_sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    strftime('%Y-%m', paid_at) AS month,
    SUM(amount) AS revenue
  FROM Payments
  GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', paid_at)
), with_prev AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    revenue,
    LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_revenue
  FROM monthly
)
SELECT
  month,
  revenue,
  ROUND(1.0 * (revenue - prev_revenue) / prev_revenue, 2) AS growth_rate
FROM with_prev
ORDER BY month;
expected_sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', paid_at) AS month, SUM(amount) AS revenue FROM Payments GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', paid_at)), with_prev AS (SELECT month, revenue, LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_revenue FROM monthly) SELECT month, revenue, ROUND(1.0 * (revenue - prev_revenue) / prev_revenue, 2) AS growth_rate FROM with_prev ORDER BY month

title: 高于课程平均分
description: 找出成绩高于所在课程平均分的学生成绩记录。返回列 course_id、student_id、score，并按 course_id、student_id 排序。
starter_sql:
WITH scored AS (
  SELECT
    course_id,
    student_id,
    score,
    AVG(score) OVER (PARTITION BY course_id) AS avg_score
  FROM Scores
)
SELECT course_id, student_id, score
FROM scored
WHERE score > avg_score
ORDER BY course_id, student_id;
expected_sql: WITH scored AS (SELECT course_id, student_id, score, AVG(score) OVER (PARTITION BY course_id) AS avg_score FROM Scores) SELECT course_id, student_id, score FROM scored WHERE score > avg_score ORDER BY course_id, student_id

title: 工单最新状态
description: 每个工单只保留最新一条状态记录；若更新时间相同，status_id 大的更新。返回列 ticket_id、status、updated_at，并按 ticket_id 升序排列。
starter_sql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    ticket_id,
    status,
    updated_at,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticket_id ORDER BY updated_at DESC, status_id DESC) AS rn
  FROM TicketStatus
)
SELECT ticket_id, status, updated_at
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY ticket_id;
expected_sql: WITH ranked AS (SELECT ticket_id, status, updated_at, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticket_id ORDER BY updated_at DESC, status_id DESC) AS rn FROM TicketStatus) SELECT ticket_id, status, updated_at FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY ticket_id

title: 经理团队人数
description: 统计每位经理直接管理的员工数量。只返回至少有 1 名直属员工的经理。返回列 manager_id、manager_name、team_size，并按 manager_id 升序排列。
starter_sql:
SELECT
  m.employee_id AS manager_id,
  m.name AS manager_name,
  COUNT(e.employee_id) AS team_size
FROM Employees m
JOIN Employees e ON m.employee_id = e.manager_id
GROUP BY m.employee_id, m.name
ORDER BY manager_id;
expected_sql: SELECT m.employee_id AS manager_id, m.name AS manager_name, COUNT(e.employee_id) AS team_size FROM Employees m JOIN Employees e ON m.employee_id = e.manager_id GROUP BY m.employee_id, m.name ORDER BY manager_id

title: 商品转化率
description: 统计每个商品的购买转化率：购买事件数 / 浏览事件数。返回列 product_id、conversion_rate，保留 2 位小数，并按 product_id 升序排列。没有浏览事件时返回 NULL。
starter_sql:
SELECT
  product_id,
  ROUND(
    1.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'purchase' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'view' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),
    2
  ) AS conversion_rate
FROM Events
GROUP BY product_id
ORDER BY product_id;
expected_sql: SELECT product_id, ROUND(1.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'purchase' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'view' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS conversion_rate FROM Events GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY product_id

title: 订单金额中位数
description: 计算所有订单金额的中位数。订单数为偶数时取中间两项平均值。返回列 median_amount。
starter_sql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    amount,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY amount) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt
  FROM Orders
)
SELECT AVG(amount) AS median_amount
FROM ranked
WHERE rn IN ((cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2);
expected_sql: WITH ranked AS (SELECT amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY amount) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt FROM Orders) SELECT AVG(amount) AS median_amount FROM ranked WHERE rn IN ((cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2)

title: 近 30 天未活跃用户
description: 以 2024-04-01 为当前日期，找出最近 30 天没有任何登录记录的用户。返回列 user_id、name，并按 user_id 升序排列。
starter_sql:
SELECT u.user_id, u.name
FROM Users u
LEFT JOIN Logins l
  ON u.user_id = l.user_id
 AND l.login_date >= date('2024-04-01', '-30 day')
 AND l.login_date < '2024-04-01'
WHERE l.user_id IS NULL
ORDER BY u.user_id;
expected_sql: SELECT u.user_id, u.name FROM Users u LEFT JOIN Logins l ON u.user_id = l.user_id AND l.login_date >= date('2024-04-01', '-30 day') AND l.login_date < '2024-04-01' WHERE l.user_id IS NULL ORDER BY u.user_id

title: 用户第三次购买
description: 找出每位用户的第三次购买记录。若同一天多笔购买，按 order_id 升序决定先后。返回列 user_id、order_id、order_date，并按 user_id 升序排列。
starter_sql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    order_id,
    order_date,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY order_date, order_id) AS rn
  FROM Orders
)
SELECT user_id, order_id, order_date
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 3
ORDER BY user_id;
expected_sql: WITH ranked AS (SELECT user_id, order_id, order_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY order_date, order_id) AS rn FROM Orders) SELECT user_id, order_id, order_date FROM ranked WHERE rn = 3 ORDER BY user_id

title: 薪资高于经理的员工
description: 找出薪资高于直属经理的员工。返回列 employee_id、employee_name，并按 employee_id 升序排列。
starter_sql:
SELECT
  e.employee_id,
  e.name AS employee_name
FROM Employees e
JOIN Employees m ON e.manager_id = m.employee_id
WHERE e.salary > m.salary
ORDER BY e.employee_id;
expected_sql: SELECT e.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name FROM Employees e JOIN Employees m ON e.manager_id = m.employee_id WHERE e.salary > m.salary ORDER BY e.employee_id
